name: TypeLib Hijacking
author: CyberSecurityUP
description: Hijack COM TypeLib registration for DLL persistence. Modifies TypeLib registry keys to load a specified DLL when a COM class is instantiated, without touching common persistence registry keys monitored by EDR.

args.name: dll_path
args.description: Full path to the DLL to load

opsec: Avoids commonly monitored Run/RunOnce keys. Uses TypeLib registry entries which are less scrutinized by EDR.
